title: Agent Skill Manifest
description: Canonical Skill manifest contract for AI-native projects (originated for zw-brain §3 + §六, generalized for any registered Skill across the dev-rules ecosystem). Every Skill registered into an Agent platform MUST validate against this schema.

skill_id.description: URN-style identifier in the form `<namespace>.<verb>` or `<namespace>.<sub_namespace>.<verb>` (e.g. `data.search`, `dashboard.render_command_center`, `national.relay_submit`). The first path segment is the Skill's domain namespace, the last is the action verb.

title.description: Human-readable Skill title (one short line). Used in marketplaces, agent prompts, and Skill cards.

description.description: Multi-line Skill description (Markdown allowed). Should answer: what does it do, when to call it, what NOT to use it for.

version.description: Semver. Major bump = breaking change to input/output schema; minor = additive; patch = bug fix only.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the Skill's input. MUST be valid JSON Schema draft 2020-12 or earlier. Empty object `{}` allowed for parameter-less Skills.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the Skill's output.

preconditions.description: Predicates that MUST hold before invocation. Engine SHOULD check these (e.g. user has permission, session is open, target resource exists) and refuse to call the Skill if any fails.

side_effects.description: Declared side effects. Read-only Skills MUST declare an empty array. Side effects drive audit, blockchain anchor, idempotency-key requirement, and read/write split for downstream consumers (e.g. dashboard-readonly check).

audit_required.description: When true (default for any Skill with side_effects), the engine MUST emit an audit_event before AND after invocation; failure to write the audit event MUST abort the Skill (per zw-brain D4 / preflight stage 7a).

idempotency.description: Idempotency policy. Required for Skills with `db_write`, `external_call`, or `state_machine_transition` side effects.

key_field.description: Name of the input field whose value is treated as the idempotency key.

ttl_seconds.description: How long the engine SHOULD remember a key to deduplicate.

permissions.description: Permission tokens required to invoke this Skill. The auth layer maps user roles → permission tokens.

rate_limit.description: Optional per-caller rate limit applied by the entry layer.

contact.description: Email / IM contact for Skill ownership questions.

registry_source.description: Origin of the Skill manifest — used by the registration adapter to detect changes and revoke.

deprecation.description: Set when the Skill is being phased out. The engine SHOULD warn callers and SHOULD NOT route new traffic to it.

examples.title: 数据资源检索
examples.description: 按关键词 / 部门 / 主题域检索共享数据资源目录，返回命中清单 + 摘要。
